title: psychotria calva var. calva
intro: Psychotria calva var. calva is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, commonly known as the "Calvata" or "Wild Coffee" due to its caffeine-like properties. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psychotria calva var. calva include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues, making it a valuable resource in folk medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
